policies.v1Final: historical evidence after V2 cut; not the live semantic authority
policies.v2SourceOfTruth: V2 semantic contracts, capability definitions, UI semantics, proofs, and validator rules are the canonical source after cut
policies.driftPolicy: V2 code must not drift from capability definitions or contracts; drift is a validator failure
policies.changePolicy: Any post-V2 behaviour change must update capability definitions, contracts, proofs, readiness, and UI semantics in the same change
policies.v1ReopenPolicy: V1 is not reopened except for evidence correction

requiredChangeSet: validator rules when a new semantic class is introduced
